steps.title: Interpret the revenue terms
steps.content: In the equation $5.65x+7.45y=1{,}348.25$, each term is a price per container times a number of containers. The total on the right is the total sales amount, so each coefficient is a unit price.

steps.title: Use the coefficient of x
steps.content: The variable $x$ represents smaller containers, so the coefficient of $x$ is the price of each smaller container. The expression $5.65x$ is total revenue from smaller containers, making the unit price $5.65$. The answer is A.
